neighborhoods.name: Santa Monica
neighborhoods.reason: Walkable, safe, and beachfront — the easiest base for solo travelers.

neighborhoods.name: Silver Lake
neighborhoods.reason: Independent cafés, restaurants, and a relaxed solo-friendly scene.

neighborhoods.name: West Hollywood
neighborhoods.reason: Central, lively, and best for nightlife within walking distance.

neighborhoods.name: Downtown LA
neighborhoods.reason: Budget value near the Arts District and Grand Ave; Metro-connected.
